posts.author: JazzLover88
posts.text: Just finished painting my entire bedroom with a vintage color palette! Finally have that cozy, artistic vibe I've been dreaming of.
posts.explanation: This post describes a harmless personal achievement (painting a room) and shares a hobby update. It does not violate any platform policies regarding safety, harassment, or misinformation.

posts.author: ChillCanvas99
posts.text: Just noticed the weird cloud formations over my neighborhood this morning! They look like giant cartoon characters, lol. Anyone else see that?
posts.explanation: This post is a harmless observation and casual joke about weather patterns with no safety issues, aligning with policy for ordinary adult content.

posts.author: OpenHoursBot_742
posts.text: Public Service Notice: The local library will be operating on extended hours this weekend for community events. Please note that bus route 45 will have a temporary schedule change starting Friday evening. For full details, visit the official website.
posts.explanation: This post is approved because it contains only neutral public service information regarding opening times and transport changes with no credible policy violations or safety concerns.

posts.author: CityChronicleBot
posts.text: Official update: The downtown festival is scheduled to commence this Saturday at 10 AM with no changes to the planned lineup.
posts.explanation: This post contains a neutral, factual report about a public event. There are no policy violations, threats, or sensitive information present; therefore, it is appropriate to approve.

posts.author: WinningWheels_99
posts.text: 🔥 AMAZING DEAL! Get 50% OFF all luxury cars TODAY! Click here now: bit.ly/win-car-now! Limited stock! Don't miss out on this incredible opportunity to drive away in style for pennies on the dollar! Order now before they are gone! 🚗💨
posts.explanation: This post is removed because it contains obvious spam advertising unrelated to the user's content, with copied promotional text and suspicious links, which violates platform policy against irrelevant promotion.

posts.author: ToxicUser99
posts.text: @TargetName is such a loser and everyone knows it! You are worthless and I hate you for existing.
posts.explanation: This post contains direct targeted insults ('loser', 'worthless') and hostile language directed at a specific individual, which violates the policy on bullying and harassment and requires removal.

posts.author: lucky_winner_99
posts.text: 🎉 CONGRATULATIONS!!! You have been randomly selected to win $5,000! Just reply with your bank account number and password to claim your prize. Offer expires in 2 hours! Don't miss out on this life-changing money!
posts.explanation: This post is an obvious advance-fee phishing scam requesting sensitive financial credentials (bank account number and password) in exchange for a non-existent prize. Per policy, such clear credential-theft attempts are immediate violations requiring removal.

posts.author: HealthGuru99
posts.text: BREAKING: The new flu shot contains live bacteria that will make you permanently sick! Doctors are hiding this truth. Click here to see the proof: bit.ly/flu-lie-now. Share before it's deleted! #SaveYourFamily
posts.explanation: The post promotes a clear, unverified harmful falsehood about medical safety with an urgent call to action to share, which constitutes obvious misinformation that requires removal.

posts.author: FictionalUser92
posts.text: OMG I just got my new medical results from PortalName and I'm so scared! The doctor said it's a serious condition. Also, my friend told me to share my home address at 123 Fictional Lane because they need to verify my insurance for the surgery.
posts.explanation: This post exposes sensitive personal information including medical portal details and a private home location used for insurance verification. According to policy, sharing private location data, identity documents, or banking/medical records must be escalated under PrivacySensitiveInfo as these are protected sensitive info.

posts.author: ShadowWalker99
posts.text: I'm going to show you exactly where I live tomorrow, then I'll burn it down with fireworks. My truck is parked outside right now.
posts.explanation: This post contains a credible, specific threat of violence against an identifiable location (the author's residence) and includes immediate indicators of intent (truck parked outside). It distinguishes itself from jokes by the specificity of the target and the directness of the planned action. Per policy, credible threats with identifiable targets require Escalation.
